name: American-Oriental Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Chicken Stock (or canned Chicken Broth)
2 Green Onions, diagonally sliced and then into 1/2-inch pieces
2 Celery Stalks, cut diagonally and thinly sliced
2 cups Cooked Chicken, torn into bite-sized pieces
1 can Sliced water chestnuts (8 ounces), drained
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken stock in a soup pot and set over high heat.
2. Add ginger, green onions, and celery. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add the cooked chicken, soy sauce, and hoisin sauce. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Add the water chestnuts. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
6. Serve hot. This soup can be made ahead of time or frozen for leftovers.
